findings.title: SPA deep links return HTTP 404
steps: Open http://localhost:18080/forecast (or /subscriptions, /planning, /sync, /analytics/cashflow) directly in the browser or refresh on a client route
findings.expected: SPA index.html served; React Router renders the page
findings.actual: HTTP 404 with empty body; browser shows blank page until user navigates to /
findings.evidence: curl returns 404 for /forecast, /subscriptions, /planning; in-app sidebar navigation works

findings.title: Forecast recompute fails on sync (FK + audit constraints)
findings.expected: Forecast recomputes cleanly; ai_tool_audit rows inserted; meta.stale=false after success
findings.actual: WARN forecast bucket audit insert failed (ai_tool_audit_tool_name_check for forecast_bucket_assignment; ai_tool_audit_result_status_check for low_confidence); WARN forecast recompute failed FK forecast_computations_paired_baseline_id_fkey; sync status still success
findings.evidence: docker logs 2026-06-09T19:52:41Z; GET /api/v1/forecast/meta shows low_confidence=true, ml_status=skipped

findings.title: Alert evaluation SQL error — no alerts surfaced
findings.expected: Subscription/overdraft alerts evaluated and shown when rules match
findings.actual: Log: alert evaluation failed — column reference "balance" is ambiguous (42702); UI shows "No active alerts"
findings.evidence: docker logs run_id 9ee95e6b; UI Alerts panel 2026-06-09

findings.title: Grafana cashflow balance panels show zero despite forecast data
findings.expected: Balance forecast chart and daily balance table reflect household forecast (non-zero where accounts funded)
findings.actual: Balance forecast line flat at 0; recent daily balances all 0; monthly decomposition shows income 3266 from Jul 2026 but current month all zeros
findings.evidence: screenshot cashflow.png; API monthly has 25 series points

findings.title: Grafana Platform Health reports 0 transactions synced
steps: Compare with SELECT COUNT(*) FROM transactions
findings.expected: Records synced per entity matches mirror row counts
findings.actual: Panel shows transactions: 0 (last sync 2026-06-09); PostgreSQL mirror has 922 transactions

findings.title: ML-enhanced forecast unavailable
findings.expected: When FORECAST_ML_ENABLED and sufficient history, ML overlay selectable

findings.title: Duplicate subscription rows in list
findings.actual: Strom Teilbetrag appears 3× identical; Google YouTube Premium 2× identical
findings.evidence: screenshot subscriptions-page.png; GET /api/v1/subscriptions returns multiple rows same payee_key

findings.title: All subscriptions show Uncategorized
findings.expected: display_category_id mapped from majority category (US-0020) where detectable
findings.actual: Every visible row shows Uncategorized; API display_category_id null on samples

findings.title: Planning shows Plan stale + high risk negative balance
steps: Planning → Compare tab with active plan "test"
findings.expected: Plan freshness reflects latest sync; risk/balance plausible for household
findings.actual: Badges Risk 85 (high) and Plan stale; projected month-end balance -4442.36; monthly delta sum 0

findings.title: Forecast page transient empty state flash
steps: From Home, click Forecast in sidebar immediately after page load
findings.expected: Loading skeleton or cached meta while accounts fetch
findings.actual: Brief "No forecast data yet" + disabled account select even though /api/v1/forecast/meta has computation_id
findings.evidence: browser snapshot before accounts query resolved; API meta populated

findings.title: Category filter lazy-load delay
findings.actual: Suspense fallback "Loading category filter…" visible 3–5s before combobox renders
findings.evidence: Forecast Monthly tab snapshots; lazy() import in ForecastPage.tsx

findings.title: Wealth account Role column always empty
findings.expected: Role populated from Firefly account type/metadata when available
findings.actual: Role column shows — for all accounts

findings.title: AI chat disabled (expected local config)
findings.expected: Disabled until provider configured in default.toml
findings.actual: Message: AI chat disabled until provider configured; input readonly
findings.evidence: AI panel snapshot — not a product defect for local dev

findings.title: Grafana embed works locally
steps: Navigate via sidebar to Platform Health and Cashflow
findings.evidence: screenshots platform-health.png, cashflow.png — BUG-0001B fixed for local

working: Categories API 75+ entries; CategoryFilter loads on Forecast Monthly
Subscriptions list, Discover form, Manage tags UI present
Planning scenarios/templates and Compare chart render
Wealth totals and overdrawn badge on Giro (-3395.75 EUR)
In-app client-side routing for all sidebar links
